name: python3-validators
title: python3-validators
description:
Python Data Validation for Humans (Python 3)
Python has all kinds of data validation tools, but every one of them
seems to require defining a schema or form. The author wanted to
create a simple validation library where validating a simple value
does not require defining a form or a schema.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-validators because Python Data Validation for Humans (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-validators as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-validators with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-validators --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
